basic_details.job_title: CMTI Bengaluru Recruitment 2026: Walk-in Interview for 71 Project Associate & Assistant Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Central Manufacturing Technology Institute (CMTI), Bengaluru has released Advertisement No. 05/2026 inviting eligible candidates for recruitment on a contract basis through walk-in-interview. The notification covers a range of posts including Senior Project Associate, Project Associate-I/II, Project Assistant-I/II, and Data Entry Operator cum Assistant (DEO), spread across mechanical, electrical/electronics, chemistry, computer science, marketing, civil, and ITI trade disciplines. Candidates are not required to apply online - registration happens directly at the venue on the date of the re

application_fee.details: Not specified in the notification. No fee details or payment mode are mentioned, consistent with this being a walk-in-interview recruitment with no online application step.

age_limit.details: Age relaxation is admissible as per Government of India orders/norms. The notification does not specify the exact relaxation years for SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PwBD categories.

qualification.details: Only Indian nationals are eligible to apply. Mere possession of the required qualification does not entitle a candidate to be called for interview; CMTI reserves the right to adopt its own shortlisting method. | Desirable qualifications and specific skill requirements vary for each of the multiple sub-posts within the Mechanical, Electrical/Electronics, and Project Assistant categories - candidates should check the exact desirable criteria for their intended post in the full notification. | First Class is defined as an aggregate of 60% marks across all semesters of the qualifying examination. Candidates from universities awarding CGPA/SGPA must convert this to a percentage using their university's formula.

salary_details.details: Senior Project Associate: ₹42,000/- + HRA per month Project Associate-I: ₹25,000/- + HRA per month (₹31,000/- + HRA if NET/GATE qualified) Project Associate-II: ₹28,000/- + HRA per month (₹35,000/- + HRA if NET/GATE qualified) Project Assistant-II: ₹20,000/- + HRA per month Project Assistant-I: ₹18,000/- + HRA per month Data Entry Operator cum Assistant: ₹20,000/- + HRA per month, or ₹22,000/- + HRA per month for the Finance-experienced DEO post Junior Research Fellow / Senior Research Fellow (stipend criteria referenced in notes): As per DST norms | House Rent Allowance (HRA) is paid at 30% of the stipend. All stipend figures are consolidated; no other benefits are admissible against these posts. The stipend for Project Associate posts varies based on the candidate's experience, per the notification's note.

selection_process: Selection is through Walk-in Interview. Registration for each post is accepted only on its designated interview date between 09:00 hrs and 09:30 hrs at the CMTI campus. Meeting the minimum qualification does not guarantee an interview call; CMTI is not obliged to shortlist every candidate who meets the minimum requirement.
how_to_apply: Download and fill the application in the prescribed format mentioned in the notification.
Report to CMTI, Tumkur Road, Bengaluru – 560022, on the interview date applicable to the post you are applying for.
Register between 09:00 hrs and 09:30 hrs on that date.
Carry the filled application along with all original certificates and one photocopy of each for verification.
Submit one application per post only.
important_instructions: Only Indian nationals are eligible to apply. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview/written examination. Candidates get one day of leave for each completed month of service; leave encashment is not permitted. Qualification and experience will be considered as possessed on 31.07.2026. Any amendment to this recruitment will be notified only on the CMTI website. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. All posts are temporary and tenure-based, with no obligation for regularization. The number of posts is indicative and may vary based on the Institute's requirement. CMTI reserves the right to fill or not fill the advertised posts without assigning reasons; selected candidates have no right to absorption into a regular CMTI post.

content_sections.heading: CMTI Recruitment 2026: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Registration for each interview is held between 09:00 hrs and 09:30 hrs on the respective date, at CMTI, Tumkur Road, Bengaluru – 560022. The cut-off date for all purposes, including age, is 31.07.2026.

content_sections.heading: CMTI Recruitment 2026: Eligibility
content_sections.text: Only Indian nationals are eligible to apply. Mere possession of the required qualification does not entitle a candidate to be called for interview; CMTI reserves the right to adopt its own shortlisting method. Desirable qualifications and specific skill requirements vary for each of the multiple sub-posts within the Mechanical, Electrical/Electronics, and Project Assistant categories - candidates should check the exact desirable criteria for their intended post in the full notification. First Class is defined as an aggregate of 60% marks across all semesters of the qualifying examination. Candidates from universities awarding CGPA/SGPA must convert this to a percentage using their university's formula.

rows.essential_qualification: First Class Master's or Integrated Master's in Physics/Optics or equivalent with 4 years' experience, OR B.E./B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering or equivalent with 4 years' experience
First Class B.E./B.Tech /M.E./M.Tech in Mechanical Engineering/Production/Industrial Engineering and allied engineering
First Class B.E./B.Tech/M.E./M.Tech in Electrical/Electronics/E&C/Instrumentation/Mechatronics/VLSI/Embedded Systems and allied branches, OR First Class M.Sc Electronics
First Class M.Sc/MS in Chemistry or allied branches
First Class B.E./B.Tech/M.E./M.Tech in Computer Science/Information Science and allied engineering, OR MCA
First Class B.E./B.Tech in any Engineering with MBA in Business/Marketing
First Class Diploma in Electrical and Electronics Engineering (EEE)/Instrumentation and allied streams
First Class Diploma in Mechanical Engineering and allied engineering
First Class Diploma in Civil Engineering
First Class ITI in Fitter/Machinist/Turner Grinder Trade, OR First Class ITI in Fitter/Electrician/Electrician Mechanic
First Class BA Hindi (Major) with Hindi as 1st language up to Class 10, OR MA (Hindi), Hindi Medium up to Class 10, with Hindi Typing and basic computer knowledge
First Class in any graduation other than engineering, with experience in MS Word, Excel, Tally, etc.
First Class B.Com/M.Com/ MBA in Finance (with minimum 2 years' proven data entry experience in an accounts department for the higher-stipend post)

content_sections.heading: CMTI Recruitment 2026: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Age relaxation is admissible as per Government of India orders/norms. The notification does not specify the exact relaxation years for SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PwBD categories.

content_sections.heading: CMTI Recruitment 2026: Stipend / Salary
content_sections.text: Senior Project Associate: ₹42,000/- + HRA per month Project Associate-I: ₹25,000/- + HRA per month (₹31,000/- + HRA if NET/GATE qualified) Project Associate-II: ₹28,000/- + HRA per month (₹35,000/- + HRA if NET/GATE qualified) Project Assistant-II: ₹20,000/- + HRA per month Project Assistant-I: ₹18,000/- + HRA per month Data Entry Operator cum Assistant: ₹20,000/- + HRA per month, or ₹22,000/- + HRA per month for the Finance-experienced DEO post Junior Research Fellow / Senior Research Fellow (stipend criteria referenced in notes): As per DST norms House Rent Allowance (HRA) is paid at 30% of the stipend. All stipend figures are consolidated; no other benefits are admissible against these posts. The stipend for Project Associate posts varies based on the candidate's experience, per the notification's note.

content_sections.heading: CMTI Recruitment 2026: Application Fee
content_sections.text: Not specified in the notification. No fee details or payment mode are mentioned, consistent with this being a walk-in-interview recruitment with no online application step.

content_sections.heading: CMTI Recruitment 2026: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection is through Walk-in Interview. Registration for each post is accepted only on its designated interview date between 09:00 hrs and 09:30 hrs at the CMTI campus. Meeting the minimum qualification does not guarantee an interview call; CMTI is not obliged to shortlist every candidate who meets the minimum requirement.

content_sections.heading: CMTI Recruitment 2026: Documents Required
content_sections.text: Duly filled application in the prescribed format Valid email ID (compulsory) All original certificates and mark sheets as proof of qualification and experience claimed, along with one photocopy of each, for verification at the time of interview Valid caste certificate (photocopy) for SC/ST/OBC/EWS candidates; OBC and EWS certificates must be in the Central Government format Documentary proof supporting any experience claimed Any discrepancy found in certificates, or non-production of original certificates at the time of interview/written test, will lead to disqualification.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for CMTI Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Download and fill the application in the prescribed format mentioned in the notification. Report to CMTI, Tumkur Road, Bengaluru – 560022, on the interview date applicable to the post you are applying for. Register between 09:00 hrs and 09:30 hrs on that date. Carry the filled application along with all original certificates and one photocopy of each for verification. Submit one application per post only.

content_sections.heading: CMTI Recruitment 2026: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Only Indian nationals are eligible to apply. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview/written examination. Candidates get one day of leave for each completed month of service; leave encashment is not permitted. Qualification and experience will be considered as possessed on 31.07.2026. Any amendment to this recruitment will be notified only on the CMTI website. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. All posts are temporary and tenure-based, with no obligation for regularization. The number of posts is indicative and may vary based on the Institute's requirement. CMTI reserves the right to fill or not fill the advertised posts without assigning reasons; selected candidates have no right to absorption into a regular CMTI post.

faq.question: Q1. What is the cut-off date for age and qualification in CMTI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: 31.07.2026, for all purposes including age and educational qualification.

faq.question: Q2. What is the CMTI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: CMTI Recruitment 2026 is a contract-based recruitment drive announced by the Central Manufacturing Technology Institute (CMTI), Bengaluru for various posts including Senior Project Associate, Project Associate, Project Assistant, and Data Entry Operator cum Assistant through Walk-in-Interview.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available in CMTI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: CMTI Recruitment 2026 offers a total of 71 vacancies across multiple disciplines including Mechanical, Electrical/Electronics, Chemistry, Computer Science, Civil, Marketing, ITI trades, and Data Entry Operator posts.

faq.question: Q4. What is the mode of application for CMTI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates do not need to apply online. The application process is through Walk-in-Interview, and candidates must register at the CMTI campus on the respective interview date.

faq.question: Q5. What is the CMTI Recruitment 2026 walk-in interview date?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview dates vary depending on the post and discipline. Interviews will be conducted from 03 August 2026 to 27 August 2026 at CMTI, Tumkur Road, Bengaluru.

faq.question: Q6. What is the eligibility qualification for CMTI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The required qualification varies by post. Candidates with B.E./B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, M.Sc, MCA, Diploma, ITI, BA, B.Com, M.Com, MBA, and other relevant qualifications can apply for different posts.

faq.question: Q7. What is the age limit for CMTI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit varies by post. It ranges from 25 years to 40 years as on 31 July 2026. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary/stipend offered in CMTI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a monthly stipend ranging from ₹18,000 to ₹42,000 plus HRA, depending on the post, qualification, and experience.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for CMTI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process is based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates must complete registration at the venue between 09:00 AM and 09:30 AM on the scheduled interview date.

faq.question: Q10. Where will the CMTI Recruitment 2026 walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at: Central Manufacturing Technology Institute (CMTI) Tumkur Road, Bengaluru – 560022, Karnataka.
